questions.q: In 1890, Jesse W. Reno patented the first escalator design, originally called the 'inclined elevator.' At which venue was his prototype first publicly demonstrated?
Peter Higgs and François Englert's theoretical predictions were experimentally confirmed in 2012 through the discovery of which particle at CERN?
In 1876, Alexander Graham Bell's telephone patent was challenged by Antonio Meucci, whose earlier telephone design was never patented primarily due to what reason?
choices: Lack of financial resources to file the patent

questions.q: In 1887, Emile Berliner invented the gramophone as an improvement over Edison's phonograph. What was the key innovation that made the gramophone superior for mass production?
choices: It could record and playback simultaneously
It used flat discs instead of cylindrical records
It required no external power source
